Where Intelligence
Meets Impact

A strategic infrastructure and engagement platform operating across emerging and international markets.

Engineer Infrastructure

Engineer energy, water, and climate infrastructure across Bangladesh and South Asia.

Learn More About Us

Our Vision & Mission

Vision

To be a trusted partner in infrastructure development and regional engagement across emerging and international markets.

Mission

To deliver high-impact infrastructure projects while convening policymakers, investors, and institutions through strategic engagement and leadership forums.

Our Verticals

Four Platforms, One Mission

Solis Engineering & Consulting

Infrastructure that works

We deliver infrastructure projects across energy, water, urban development, and beyond - from feasibility to commissioning. Partnering with stakeholders and investors to provide expertise and execution capabilities across Bangladesh

Greymatter powered by Solis Group

Intelligence for decision-makers

Real-time media monitoring, policy analysis, and strategic research. We track narratives and deliver actionable intelligence - helping institutions, investors, and governments make informed decisions in complex markets. From reputation management to market intelligence, we turn information into insight across any landscape.

Solis Global Forum

Where leaders convene

Roundtables and symposia bringing together diplomats, policymakers, regional experts thought leaders to advance cooperation on investment, policy, security, and the critical challenges shaping emerging markets.

House of Solis

Culture meets policy

We curate exhibitions, artist residencies, and cultural exchanges that connect creative communities across borders - bridging contemporary art with cultural diplomacy.

Our Approach

Where Ambition Becomes Outcome

Cross-Border Execution

Supporting infrastructure projects and multi-stakeholder initiatives across borders with local knowledge and global networks.

Strategic Intelligence

Real-time media monitoring, policy analysis, and strategic research helping institutions make informed decisions.

High-Level Convening

Roundtables and symposia bringing together diplomats, policymakers, and thought leaders on critical challenges.

Integrated Solutions

Combining infrastructure engineering, intelligence, forums, and cultural programming into unified solutions.

Leadership

Our Leadership

Nahar Khan

Founder & President, Solis Group

Nahar Khan is Founder & President of Solis Group, where she leads operational and commercial strategy across infrastructure, intelligence, and strategic engagement in emerging markets.

Through Solis Group, she structures partnerships across engineering and infrastructure projects, media monitoring and intelligence, policy forums, and cultural and art initiatives. Her work centers on aligning international expertise with local execution capacity, helping stakeholders navigate regulatory environments and turn vision into delivered outcomes.

Khan's background spans media, communications, and regional analysis. She builds platforms that connect policy insight with commercial decision-making, helping international organizations understand on-the-ground realities in Bangladesh and South Asia.

Khan is Executive Editor at United News of Bangladesh (UNB), South Asia's first fully digitized private newswire, where she leads editorial governance, crisis-ready newsroom operations, and technology-enabled reporting. She also serves as Board Representative for UNB at AsiaNet, fostering collaboration among leading news agencies and communications firms across Asia-Pacific.

A strategic infrastructure and engagement platform operating across emerging and international markets. Engineering, intelligence, forums, and culture.
